awards.title: Nobel Prize in Physics
awards.summary: The Nobel Prizes are five separate prizes that, according to Alfred Nobel's will of 1895, are awarded to 'those who, during the preceding year, have conferred the greatest benefit to humankind.'

publications.name: Companies’ E-waste Estimation Based on General Equilibrium Theory Context and Random Forest Regression Algorithm in Cameroon: Case Study of SMEs Implementing ISO 14001: 2015
publications.publisher: Journal of Management Science & Engineering Research
publications.summary: The article presents a machine learning model that predicts WEEE generated by Cameroonian SMEs adopting ISO 14001:2015 initiatives, providing a tool for companies and stakeholders to set realistic WEEE management objectives and promote sustainable socio-environmental practices.

projects.name: Quantum Computing
projects.summary: Quantum computing is the use of quantum-mechanical phenomena such as superposition and entanglement to perform computation. Computers that perform quantum computations are known as quantum computers.
